runs.context_blueprint: {"language": "Python", "build_system": "pip", "package_manager": "pip", "build_commands": ["python3 -m pip install ."], "install_commands": ["apt-get update", "apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends build-essential libmagic1", "rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*"], "runtime_requirements": {"language_version": "3.12", "system_packages": ["libmagic1"]}, "repo_type": "cli_tool", "base_image": "python:3.12-bookworm", "base_image_rationale": "Official Python 3.12 image on Debian Bookworm suitable for building and testing a Python CLI tool.", "pitfalls": ["python-magic requires libmagic at runtime; ensure libmagic1 is installed in the image.", "setup.py may perform packaging steps that expect Python 2-era utilities; test with Python 3 to ensure compatibility.", "S3cmd packaging uses sdist and may re-create man pages requiring external Perl/perl script; not invoked during simple pip install"], "notes": "The configuration aligns with run-tests.dockerfile behavior, which installs the package via pip from source and runs tests. The base image is chosen from DOCKER OFFICIAL IMAGES."}
runs.final_dockerfile:
FROM python:3.12-bookworm

ENV PYTHONUNBUFFERED=1

# Install system dependencies required for building and runtime
RUN apt-get update \
 && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends build-essential libmagic1 \
 && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

WORKDIR /opt/s3cmd

# Copy source code
COPY . /opt/s3cmd

# Build and install the project from source
RUN python3 -m pip install --upgrade pip setuptools wheel
RUN python3 -m pip install --no-cache-dir .

# Expose the CLI as the container's entry point
ENTRYPOINT ["s3cmd"]
CMD ["--help"]

  -h, --help            show this help message and exit
  --configure           Invoke interactive (re)configuration tool. Optionally

  --access_token=ACCESS_TOKEN
                        AWS Access Token
  -n, --dry-run         Only show what should be uploaded or downloaded but

artifacts.content:
FROM python:3.12-bookworm

ENV PYTHONUNBUFFERED=1

# Install system dependencies required for building and runtime
RUN apt-get update \
 && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends build-essential libmagic1 \
 && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

WORKDIR /opt/s3cmd

# Copy source code
COPY . /opt/s3cmd

# Build and install the project from source
RUN python3 -m pip install --upgrade pip setuptools wheel
RUN python3 -m pip install --no-cache-dir .

# Expose the CLI as the container's entry point
ENTRYPOINT ["s3cmd"]
CMD ["--help"]
